name: apply_design_system
description:
Applies a Stitch Design System to one or more existing screens, updating their visual theme.

**Input Requirements (CRITICAL):**
1. **`projectId` (string - MANDATORY):** Numeric ID only.
2. **`selectedScreenIds` (array - MANDATORY):** Numeric screen IDs.
3. **`assetId` (string - MANDATORY):** Design system asset identifier.

projectId.description: Required. Numeric project ID only — do NOT include 'projects/' prefix.

selectedScreenIds.description: Required. Array of numeric screen IDs to apply the design system to.

assetId.description: Required. The design system asset identifier from list or create operations.

outputComponents.description: Array of output components with updated screen data.
